title: canarium divergens
intro: Canarium divergens, also known as the divers or sea almond tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. It is native to tropical Pacific islands and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The bark, leaves, and fruit of the plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Canarium divergens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
